case_title: DESSMAN, REVIUS vs. CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DESSMAN, REVIUS AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO HICKY, WILLIAM DOES 1 TO 60 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          SEP-22-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-24-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       SEP-05-1995
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF SEP-22-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON SEP-22-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR OCT-23-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-12-1995 Sweep; Adjudicated
